---
title: "Engineering in Development: Transport"
description: "Robin Lovelace and Andy Mcloughlin (2015). Engineering in Development: Transport. *Engineers Without Borders UK*."
date: "2015-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_engineering_2015"
citation-type: "book"
citation-type-label: "Book"
venue: "Engineers Without Borders UK"
doi: ""
publication-url: ""
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
  - "Andy Mcloughlin"
---

**Type:** Book
**Venue:** Engineers Without Borders UK
**Year:** 2015

[BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Robin Lovelace and Andy Mcloughlin (2015). Engineering in Development: Transport. *Engineers Without Borders UK*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@book{lovelace_engineering_2015,
  title = {Engineering in {{Development}}: {{Transport}}},
  author = {Lovelace, Robin and Mcloughlin, Andy},
  date = {2015},
  publisher = {Engineers Without Borders UK},
  location = {London},
  pagetotal = {135}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
